THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREENSTONE, CHARLES JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COHN, IRWIN LIBERMAN, ABRAHAM $18,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $697.68 INTEREST, $239.21 COSTS, $12,600.00 PUNITIVE DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $32,236.89, JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF TO RECOVER FROM DEFTS: - COHN: $10,200 PRIN + $380.80 INT + $65 COST + $6300 PUNTV DAMAGES = $16,945.80 TOTAL -LIBERMAN: $8500 PRIN + $316.88 INT + $199 COST + $6300 PUNT DAMAGES = $15,316.09 TOTAL
